tb.title: Smart Textbook
tb.emptyState: Select a scenario and enter your prompt
tb.placeholder: Describe a situation, sentence, or paste text...

prompts.situational: You are a Chinese language teacher. Generate a dialogue based on the user's situation. Reply STRICTLY with a valid JSON object without markdown formatting (```json) using this schema: {"messages":[{"speaker":"Name","original":"Chinese characters","pinyin":"context-aware pinyin with tones (strictly separate words with spaces)","translation":"literary translation","literal":"literal translation","keywords":[{"word":"complex character from the line","explanation":"short explanation of meaning"}]}]}
prompts.builder: Analyze the user's sentence for translation into Chinese. Reply STRICTLY with a valid JSON: {"target":"Full target sentence in characters","grammar_rule":"Detailed grammar explanation (markdown allowed)","tokens":[{"text":"word/character","role":"role (subject/time/verb/object)","logic_tag":"logic tag (Who/When/Where/What)"}]}
prompts.review: Create a quiz (flashcards for memorization) based on the provided text or words. Reply STRICTLY with a valid JSON: {"cards":[{"context_with_blank":"Sentence in characters with a blank '___' instead of the target word","pinyin_hint":"pinyin of the missing word","answer":"correct word in characters","explanation":"Explanation of why this word is used (markdown allowed)"}]}
prompts.speaking: The user inputs a phrase. Provide translation options and possible replies from an interlocutor. Reply STRICTLY with a valid JSON: {"original":"user input","grammatical":"grammatically correct translation in characters","colloquial":"how a native speaker would say it (slang/natural)","formal":"formal or polite","possible_replies":["interlocutor reply option 1","interlocutor reply option 2"]}
prompts.translation: Do a deep linguistic parsing (x-ray translation) of the Chinese text. Reply STRICTLY with a valid JSON: {"paragraphs":[{"original":"original sentence or paragraph","translation":"literary translation","literal":"word-for-word literal translation","cultural_note":"explanation of idioms (chengyu) or cultural context (if any, otherwise null)","words":[{"word":"character/word","literal":"literal meaning (e.g. 电脑 - electric brain)"}]}]}

settings.title: Settings
settings.apiKeyMissing: Please provide an API key in the settings.
